header.description: Browse by-laws, AGM minutes, circulars, and management statements in one place.

documents.title: Renovation_Guidelines_2026.pdf
documents.description: Guidelines for unit renovation, contractor registration, and renovation deposit requirements.
documents.previewBody: This mocked in-app view represents a resident-readable summary of approved renovation hours, contractor access rules, renovation deposits, and House Rules set by management.

documents.title: AGM_Minutes_2025.docx
documents.description: Minutes recorded during the annual general meeting with resolutions and voting updates.
documents.previewBody: This mocked in-app view summarizes agenda items, resolutions passed, JMB updates, and maintenance matters recorded during the AGM.

documents.title: Management_Statement_FY2025.xlsx
documents.description: Summary of maintenance collections, sinking fund balances, and major operating expenses.
documents.previewBody: This mocked in-app view provides a simplified summary of maintenance income, sinking fund allocation, arrears, and major operating expenses for the property.

documents.title: Lift_Refurbishment_Circular.pdf
documents.description: Circular on lift refurbishment schedule and expected service impact by tower.
documents.previewBody: This mocked in-app view outlines the work schedule, affected towers, and access guidance for residents during refurbishment.

helpCard.description: Archived circulars, stamped letters, and older management records can still be requested from the management office.
